```json
        "allowed_urls",
        "allowed_methods",
        "allowed_asset",
        "max_amount_per_call",
        "max_amount_per_period",
        "period_seconds"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "agent_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "policy_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "enabled": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "allowed_urls": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "format": "uri"
          }
        },
        "allowed_methods": {
          "type": "array",
          "minItems": 1,
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1
          }
        },
        "allowed_asset": {
          "type": "object",
          "additionalProperties": true
        },
        "max_amount_per_call": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$"
        },
        "max_amount_per_period": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$"
        },
        "period_seconds": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 1
        },
        "secret_scopes": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string",
            "minLength": 1
          },
          "default": []
        }
      }
    },
    "outputSummary": [
      "status",
      "policy"
    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "grimoire.policy.get",
    "title": "Get Policy",
    "status": "implemented",
    "description": "Read one policy plus current local spend metadata.",
    "input": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "agent_id",
        "policy_id"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "agent_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "policy_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "outputSummary": [
      "found",
      "policy"
    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "payment.fetch",
    "title": "x402 Payment Fetch",
    "status": "settlement-ready",
    "description": "Create a durable x402 payment intent after policy approval. With request_challenge=true, make the first HTTP request, redact and persist any 402 requirements, validate them against policy, and either persist disabled/failed receipts or, when real settlement is configured, retry the resource with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE and persist only verified settlement receipts without exposing signed payloads.",
    "input": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "agent_id",
        "policy_id",
        "method",
        "url"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "agent_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "policy_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "method": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1,
          "default": "GET"
        },
        "url": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "uri"
        },
        "expected_amount": {
          "type": "string",
          "pattern": "^\\d+(\\.\\d+)?$"
        },
        "idempotency_key": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "request_challenge": {
          "type": "boolean",
          "default": false
        }
      }
    },
    "outputSummary": [
      "allowed",
      "payment_id",
      "status",
      "next_state",
      "settlement",
      "requirements_json",
      "challenge",
      "settlement_blocker"
    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "payment.receipt",
    "title": "Read Payment Receipt",
    "status": "implemented",
    "description": "Return persisted payment intent and receipt metadata. Signed payloads and secrets are never returned.",
    "input": {
      "type": "object",
      "required": [
        "payment_id"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "payment_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        }
      }
    },
    "outputSummary": [
      "found",
      "payment_id",
      "intent",
      "receipt"
    ]
  },
  {
    "name": "audit.tail",
    "title": "Tail Audit Events",
    "status": "implemented",
    "description": "Return recent audit events for memory, Grimoire, payment, and anchor activity.",
    "input": {
      "type": "object",
      "properties": {
        "agent_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "event_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "minLength": 1
        },
        "limit": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 1,
          "maximum": 200
        }
      }
    },
    "outputSummary": [
      "count",
      "events"
    ]
  }
]
```
